Sample Attrition: Icon Array

Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi

2026-07-17

library(tidyverse)

source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

# Load data (headers/values whitespace-scrubbed) and validate YAML params.
# All data scrubbing + plotting now lives in viz_icon_array() (2_R/2.6_viz_functions.R).
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)
cerp_validate(raw_data, params[grepl("_var$", names(params))])
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.6_viz_functions.R"), local = TRUE)

# Thin wrapper: map the YAML params into viz_icon_array() and print the ggplot it
# returns. Empty-string text params keep the auto-generated defaults.
viz_icon_array(
  data           = raw_data,
  category_var   = params$category_var,
  scale_factor   = params$scale_factor,
  unit_name      = params$unit_name,
  metric_name    = params$metric_name,
  chart_title    = params$chart_title,
  chart_subtitle = params$chart_subtitle,
  source_note    = params$source_note
)
